briefdescription.para: This function handles a standard device request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller.
is a pointer to the data structure containing the setup request.

briefdescription.para: This function handles a Setup Data packet from the host.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller.
is the structure containing the setup request.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of chapter 9 specific code for the example.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 sg 06/06/16 First release 1.1 vak 30/11/16 Added DFU support 1.4 BK 12/01/18 Renamed the file and added changes to have a common example for all USB IPs. 1.5 vak 13/02/19 Added support for versal 1.5 vak 03/25/19 Fixed incorrect data_alignment pragma directive for IAR 1.6 ka 24/12/25 Fix EP0 STALL handling for invalid descriptor requests
